{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [{"login": "Root1856", "type": "reporter"}], "credits_detailed": [{"state": "accepted", "type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/68995115?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Root1856/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Root1856/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Root1856/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Root1856/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Root1856", "id": 68995115, "login": "Root1856", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY4OTk1MTE1", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Root1856/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Root1856/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Root1856/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Root1856/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Root1856/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Root1856", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45545", "cvss": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-89"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-89", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')"}], "description": "### Impact

An authenticated attacker with access to the Tables app may be able to execute arbitrary up to 20 bytes long SQL queries, through a stored injection. With carefully crafted input it is possible to break out of the length limitation. The attacker could use this to extract information from the database, or modify data.

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Tables app is upgraded to 2.0.0 or 1.0.4 or 0.9.8 or 0.8.10 or 0.7.7

### Workarounds

<!-- Remove not applicable sections -->

* Disable Tables app

### References

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3462991)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/tables/pull/2309)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)
* Customers: Open a support ticket at [portal.nextcloud.com](https://portal.nextcloud.com)", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x43f-gmgh-vvjj", "html_url": "https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/security/advisories/GHSA-x43f-gmgh-vvjj", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x43f-gmgh-vvjj"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-45545"}], "private_fork": null, "published_at": "2026-05-13T06:39:05Z", "publisher": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/84044328?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/DorraJaouad", "id": 84044328, "login": "DorraJaouad", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjg0MDQ0MzI4", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/DorraJaouad", "user_view_type": "public"}, "severity": "high", "state": "published", "submission": null, "summary": "SQL Injection in Column Type Parameter Allows Arbitrary SQL Execution", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T06:39:05Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/repos/nextcloud/security-advisories/security-advisories/GHSA-x43f-gmgh-vvjj", "vulnerabilities": [{"package": {"ecosystem": "nextcloud", "name": "Tables"}, "patched_versions": "0.7.7,0.8.10,0.9.8,1.0.4,2.0.0", "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">=0.7.0,>=0.8.0,>=0.9.0,>=1.0.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: SQL Injection in Column Type Parameter Allows Arbitrary SQL Execution
